base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of homer — a character from 1991 the simpsons arcade game. Homer Simpson — player 1. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Homer Simpson — player 1; bare-hand punches + skateboard + ball weapons
